chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT HYDERABAD C.P. No.S-1574 of 2016 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on office objection 2. For katcha peshi. 24.10.2016. Mr. Ashok Kumar D. Lohano, Advocate alongwith petitioner. Mr. Muhammad Jameel Khan, Advocate for respondents No.4, 11 & 12. Mr. Anwar H. Ansari, State Counsel a/w SIP Manzoor Ali o/b of SSP Hyderabad and ASI Hadi Bux of P.S Fort. = It is, inter-alia, contended that respondents No.4 to 12, who are step children of petitioner and according to learned Counsel, she is being continuously harassed by them. Today, respondents No.4, 11 & 12 are in attendance alongwith their Counsel, who submit that no harassment has been caused to the petitioner but they are agitating their rights of inheritance as the property in question belongs to their deceased father Late Mirza Wahajuddin and the said property is the estate left by the deceased. Be that as it may, the respondents, if have any grievance, can file the appropriate remedy before the competent Court of law but under the plea of distribution of inheritance, they cannot cause any harassment to the petitioner. In this regard, official respondents are also directed to ensure that no one either petitioner or private respondents should violate the law. In view of the above, the present petition stands disposed of. JUDGE Shahid
